---
title: "descriptiveStats"
output: html_document
---

# descriptiveStats

A lightweight R package providing reproducible, audit-friendly descriptive statistical summaries for structured datasets. Designed for regulated analytical environments where traceability, consistency, and deterministic outputs are required.

---

# Overview

The `descriptiveStats` package standardises descriptive statistical reporting across datasets. It ensures consistent handling of missing values, grouped summaries, and percentile-based analysis.

It is designed primarily for:
- Clinical trial datasets (e.g. SDTM-aligned structures)
- Regulatory reporting pipelines
- Structured exploratory data analysis workflows

## Design Principles

- Deterministic outputs (no stochastic behaviour)
- Explicit handling of missing values
- Reproducible grouped summaries
- Minimal dependency footprint
- Audit-friendly and traceable outputs

---

# Installation

```r
# Install from local source
devtools::install_local("descriptiveStats")

# Install from GitHub (if hosted)
devtools::install_github("your-org/descriptiveStats")
